connector.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud
connector.description: Connect to your SAP S/4HANA Cloud instance via OData v4. Read-only agent access to FI / CO / MM / SD entities.

view.phase_description: This module will host the SAP connection config, status, OData entity browser and audit log. Phases 1 to 5 incoming.

describe_entity.label: SAP — Describe entity
describe_entity.description: Return the cached definition of a SAP EntitySet (properties, types, navigations). Call this before sap_select / sap_aggregate.

search_entity.label: SAP — Search entity
search_entity.description: Substring-search the cached EntitySet catalogue. Useful when the exact name is unknown.

select.label: SAP — OData select
select.description: Run a filtered and projected OData GET ($filter / $select / $orderby / $top) on an EntitySet.

count.label: SAP — Count
count.description: Return the row count of an EntitySet (with optional $filter).

top_n.label: SAP — Top N
top_n.description: Return the top N rows of an EntitySet ordered by a given property. Thin wrapper around $top + $orderby.

aggregate.label: SAP — Aggregate
aggregate.description: Compute aggregates (sum / avg / min / max / count / countdistinct) over an EntitySet via $apply=aggregate(...).

navigate.label: SAP — Follow navigation
navigate.description: Follow a Navigation Property from a single record (e.g. all addresses of a Business Partner).

lookup.label: SAP — Admin lookup
lookup.description: Admin only. Fetch a SAP record by primary key with access to technical fields.

invoke_function.label: SAP — Invoke function import
invoke_function.description: Admin only. Invoke a SAP OData function import (read-only).
